# Send partner comms to redvision MFD

: Ranjan kumar Singh
Created time: January 6, 2025 9:03 AM
Status: In progress
Last edited: February 19, 2026 7:12 PM
Owner: Lalit Bihani

# **What problem are we solving?**

A new communication configuration is required to handle communications for MFDs operating on B2B platforms (such as RedVision and InvestWell) separately from those on the Volt platform.

---

# **How do we measure success?**

---

# **How are others solving this problem?**

---

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

## User stories / User flow

## Requirements

- Current configuration has filters based on lender.
- Additionally, we need filters based on platform to assign different communication templates to different partner platforms.
- We need to send similar types of communications to all B2B platforms.
    - Currently, we send partner communications which include links redirecting to the Volt partner dashboard, but we do not want RedVision MFD communications to link to the Volt partner dashboard.

# **Appendix**

## Meeting notes

- MFD onboard themself
    - Phone number email basic details , No OTP , PAN , address, bank details , ARN number
- Redvision Gives software to MFD
    - MFD can check
    - End customer can check
- MFD can all there ARN linked customer as Unregistered
- Revision has over 3000 MFDs using there platfrom
-
